title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF NASULI-"B" IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO SANTO TOMAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6711 / 53 OG No. 17, 5520 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1774, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF NASULI-"B" IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO SANTO TOMAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Nasuli-"B" in the Municipality of Dao, Province of Antique, is hereby changed to Santo Tomas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
